message:
✨ Add resource detail modals for CPU, Memory, Storage, GPU

- Create ResourceDetailModals.tsx with detailed views for each resource type
- CPU modal shows cores per node with capacity/allocation breakdown
- Memory modal shows memory per node with capacity breakdown
- Storage modal shows ephemeral storage and PVC support structure
- GPU modal shows GPU types, allocation, and per-node breakdown
- Connect modals to clickable stats cards in ClusterDetailModal
- All cards now show "click for details" hint on hover
- Modals honor cluster filtering from parent context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
